name: Xerox Holdings Corporation
description: Xerox Holdings Corporation is a global workplace technology company that specializes in digital printing, document management, and business process outsourcing solutions. Headquartered in Norwalk, Connecticut, the company provides a wide range of hardware, software, and services designed to enhance productivity and streamline workflows for enterprises of all sizes. From digital printing presses and multifunction office systems to advanced IT and security services, Xerox leverages its long-standing history of innovation to help businesses digitize operations, manage information, and improve efficiency in an increasingly connected and mobile work environment.
